text: Hi there! I'm Stratus, your weather and clothing assistant. Ask me anything about clothing suggestions, current weather conditions, or outing recommendations!
Review my clothing choice and rate it against the weather today, adding any suggestions if you have them.

Hello g! It is so lovely to chat with you today. 

I noticed you shared a charming little pixel art picture of a cozy green house rather than an outfit photo. While I absolutely love the cute and colorful vibes of this little cottage, I cannot review your clothing choices from it! 

Let us talk about the weather instead so we can get you styled perfectly. Right now, it is a cool 14 degrees Celsius, but we are heading up to a very hot and sunny high of 33 degrees Celsius today. 

Because of this huge temperature jump, layers are your best friend today. I highly recommend starting with a breathable base like a light cotton t-shirt, a tank top, or a linen shirt paired with comfortable shorts or lightweight trousers. For the chilly morning, layer a light denim jacket, cardigan, or sweatshirt on top that you can easily tie around your waist or pop in a bag as the afternoon heat kicks in. Since the sky is clear and bright, do not forget your sunglasses and some sunscreen to stay protected.

If you want to try uploading a photo of your actual outfit, I would love to take a look and rate it for you, g. Have a wonderful and sunny day!
